abstracts.abstract: By Representative Luddy of Orleans and Senator Cyr, a joint petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 4290) of Hadley Luddy (by vote of the town) that the town of Chatham be authorized to establish a housing trust fund in said town.  Housing.  [Local Approval Received.]

bill.title: An Act establishing a housing trust fund in the town of Chatham

action.description: Committee reported that the matter be placed in the Orders of the Day for the next sitting
